title: WIDDOP TWINKLE RATTLE (8869005)
description: Twinkle Twinkle Silver-Plated Baby Rattle A beautiful silver-plated baby rattle with luxury gift box. From the twinkle twinkle collection by celebrations - soothing, gentle and calm - perfect giftware for a precious new arrival. Details: - classic dumbell shaped baby rattle with domed ends and curved bar - suitable for engraving for an even more personal gift - luxury silver foil embossed branded gift box - the perfect new baby or christening gift please supervise children at all times. With a gender neutral colour palette of silver and white, this wonderful trend led baby range, makes a brilliant gift for newborns. Taking inspiration from the classic nursery rhyme ‘twinkle twinkle little star’ the range uses star and moon imagery paired with beautiful sentiment on a collection of mantel plaques, frames, keepsake boxes and silverplated items. Size: H x 40 W x 90 D x 40
